name: codex-sidecar
description: Shared Codex sidecar agent bridge for reviews, exploration, and scoped work.

scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter codex-sidecar-core build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter codex-sidecar-core test && corepack pnpm --filter codex-sidecar-cli test && corepack pnpm --filter codex-sidecar-mcp test
